leadText: The Burn Heal (Japanese: やけどなおし Burn Heal) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It cures a Pokémon from a burn.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon from a burn .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Medicine for curing a Pok é mon that is suffering from a burn. G S C Heals burned Pok é mon . R S E Colo Heals Pok é mon of a burn. FR LG A spray-type medicine. It heals one Pok é mon of a burn. XD Heals a burned Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It heals a single Pokémon that is suffering from a burn. X Y OR AS S M US UM A spray-type medicine for treating burns. It can be used once to heal a Pokémon suffering from a burn. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A spray-type medicine for treating burns. It can be used to heal a single Pokémon suffering from a burn. S V ZA A spray-type medicine for treating burns. It can be used to cure a Pokémon suffering from a burn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Cures burning.

Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The Burn Heal appears as a Wonder Launcher item. It costs 4 points to use.
